title: Measure personal-ledger performance
preconditions: Release binary and production SQLite settings with three accounts, 100000 active transactions, two pools, representative categories, evidence, reconciliation, attribution, correction and relationship history; host and concurrent workload can be recorded.
steps: Warm according to the benchmark protocol; measure thirty actuals first-page plus full grouped totals, reconciliation-candidate projections, completed-scope coverage projections, and ordinary single-entity writes; report p50, p95, environment, and correctness.
expected: Every measured operation returns exact membership, totals, groups, pagination, reconciliation, coverage, or mutation outcomes and reports p50 and p95. No fixed latency assertion blocks the initial CLI field-validation release.
